EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control additional properties and methods for projected coordinate systems.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D9B13C10-5C5E-11D5-9FEE-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface IProjectedCoordinateSystem3 : IProjectedCoordinateSystem2, IProjectedCoordinateSystem, ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo
